# Mushi Mushi

> Bug intelligence SDK — shake-to-report, AI triage, agentic fixes.

Canonical docs: https://docs.mushimushi.dev
GitHub: https://github.com/kensaurus/mushi-mushi
npm org: https://www.npmjs.com/org/mushi-mushi

## SDK quickstarts

- [Choose your stack](https://docs.mushimushi.dev/quickstart)
- [React](https://docs.mushimushi.dev/quickstart/react)
- [Web / vanilla JS](https://docs.mushimushi.dev/quickstart/web)
- [React Native](https://docs.mushimushi.dev/quickstart/react-native)
- [MCP server](https://docs.mushimushi.dev/quickstart/mcp)

## SDK reference

- [SDK index](https://docs.mushimushi.dev/sdks)
- [Project ID & API keys](https://docs.mushimushi.dev/concepts/credentials)
- [@mushi-mushi/web](https://docs.mushimushi.dev/sdks/web)
- [@mushi-mushi/cli](https://docs.mushimushi.dev/sdks/cli)
- [@mushi-mushi/mcp](https://docs.mushimushi.dev/sdks/mcp)
